content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 29, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 29, 2026, focused on enhancing agent orchestration, cloud infrastructure, and data integrity. The team opened several pull requests aimed at improving sub-agent routing, fleet management, and trajectory logging accuracy.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work was recorded for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Orchestration and Routing Improvements**
    *   [#8047](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8047): Fixes sub-agent completion grounding and prevents respawn cascades.
    *   [#8046](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8046): Updates build request routing to use context-based routing instead of keyword regex.
*   **Cloud and Infrastructure**
    *   [#8049](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8049): Introduces a fleet-upgrade reconciler for blue/green image swaps.
    *   [#8043](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8043): Resolves a renderer diagnostic mirror warning on 404 errors in the desktop environment.
*   **Core Logic and Data Handling**
    *   [#8050](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8050): Updates prompts to correctly retrieve current date/time/year from runtime context.
    *   [#8044](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8044): Fixes trajectory logging to record empty objects as `{}` rather than `"[object Object]"`.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None.*

## NEW ISSUES
*None.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None.*
